← Return to the Codex
🌿

COURSE CATALOG

🌿

Curricula Integra

Complete course modules combining textbooks, video lectures, and interactive quizzes. Each course is a self-contained learning experience — read, watch, and test your knowledge.

📖

Read

Download the LaTeX-typeset textbook (Student or Teacher edition)

➜
🎥

Watch

View AI-generated video overviews on our YouTube channel

➜
✎

Quiz

Test comprehension with auto-graded Google Forms quizzes

Video production is ongoing. New courses and chapters are added regularly as the Curriculum Factory processes each textbook through the multimedia pipeline.

📊

Mathematics

▼

Math I

Elementary / Middle School

Foundational mathematics: whole numbers, fractions, decimals, and introductory geometry.

📖 Textbook 🎥 Videos — Coming Soon ✎ Quizzes — Coming Soon

Math II

Middle School

Extended math: ratios, percentages, integers, equations, and data analysis.

📖 Textbook 🎥 Videos — Coming Soon ✎ Quizzes — Coming Soon

Algebra: The First Year

High School

Complete first-year algebra with worked examples and exercises.

📖 Textbook 🎥 Videos — Coming Soon ✎ Quizzes — Coming Soon

Algebra: The Second Year

High School

Second-year algebra: polynomials, rational expressions, and functions.

📖 Textbook 🎥 Videos — Coming Soon ✎ Quizzes — Coming Soon

Business Math: Practical Applications

High School / Adult

Real-world financial math: payroll, interest, depreciation, and investments.

📖 Textbook 🎥 Videos — Coming Soon ✎ Quizzes — Coming Soon

Reading Charts, Graphs, and Diagrams

Middle / High School

Visual literacy: reading and interpreting statistical graphics.

📖 Textbook 🎥 Videos — Coming Soon ✎ Quizzes — Coming Soon

Financial Literacy for High School

High School

Personal finance: budgeting, banking, credit, insurance, and investing.

📖 Textbook 🎥 Videos — Coming Soon ✎ Quizzes — Coming Soon

History & Humanities

▼

History & Humanities I

Middle / High School

Ancient Greece through the age of Charlemagne. Primary sources, maps, and historical analysis across 20 chapters.

1 section ready

📖 Textbook 🎥 Playlist ✎ Quizzes (1)

History & Humanities II

Middle / High School

Alfred the Great to the Protestant Reformation.

📖 Textbook 🎥 Videos — Coming Soon ✎ Quizzes — Coming Soon

History & Humanities III

Middle / High School

Queen Elizabeth I to World War I.

📖 Textbook 🎥 Videos — Coming Soon ✎ Quizzes — Coming Soon

We the People

Middle School

An introduction to government historically, with a focus on America.

📖 Textbook 🎥 Videos — Coming Soon ✎ Quizzes — Coming Soon
📜

Philosophy & Literature

▼

The Sage of Baltimore (Mencken)

High School / University

H.L. Mencken's political philosophy: democracy, liberty, and the American experience across 26 chapters of primary texts and analysis.

47 sections ready

📖 Textbook 🎥 Playlist ✎ Quizzes (45)

The Trial of Socrates (Plato I)

High School

Plato's Apology and Crito with guided reading, analysis, and discussion questions.

📖 Textbook 🎥 Videos — Coming Soon ✎ Quizzes — Coming Soon

The Death of Socrates (Plato II)

High School

Plato's Phaedo: the final hours and arguments for the immortality of the soul.

📖 Textbook 🎥 Videos — Coming Soon ✎ Quizzes — Coming Soon

The Life of Man (Aristotle I)

High School

Aristotle's Ethics and Politics: virtue, justice, friendship, and the good life.

7 sections ready

📖 Textbook 🎥 Videos — Coming Soon ✎ Quizzes (7)

The Life of Words (Aristotle II)

High School

Aristotle's Poetics and Rhetoric: tragedy, epic, and the art of persuasion.

📖 Textbook 🎥 Videos — Coming Soon ✎ Quizzes — Coming Soon

The Life of Being (Aristotle III)

High School / University

Aristotle's Metaphysics and Physics: substance, form, causation, and the prime mover.

📖 Textbook 🎥 Videos — Coming Soon ✎ Quizzes — Coming Soon

First Philosophy (Descartes)

High School / University

Descartes' Meditations: doubt, the cogito, God, and mind-body dualism.

📖 Textbook 🎥 Videos — Coming Soon ✎ Quizzes — Coming Soon

Powers and Principalities (Machiavelli)

High School / University

Machiavelli's The Prince: power, virtue, fortune, and political realism.

📖 Textbook 🎥 Videos — Coming Soon ✎ Quizzes — Coming Soon

Tales of the Decameron (Boccaccio)

High School

Selected tales from Boccaccio's Decameron with analysis and discussion.

📖 Textbook 🎥 Videos — Coming Soon ✎ Quizzes — Coming Soon

Reading the Modern Short Story

High School

Chekhov, Joyce, Hemingway, and more: close reading of masterful short fiction.

📖 Textbook 🎥 Videos — Coming Soon ✎ Quizzes — Coming Soon

Reading a Modern Novel: The Great Gatsby

High School

Chapter-by-chapter reading companion for Fitzgerald's masterpiece.

📖 Textbook 🎥 Videos — Coming Soon ✎ Quizzes — Coming Soon

The Cloister and the Cell (Monasticism)

High School

The history and spirituality of Christian monasticism from the Desert Fathers to modern communities.

📖 Textbook 🎥 Videos — Coming Soon ✎ Quizzes — Coming Soon

Shakespeare's Sonnets: A Reading Companion

High School

All 154 sonnets with analysis, glossary, and thematic groupings.

📖 Textbook 🎥 Videos — Coming Soon ✎ Quizzes — Coming Soon

Discover Science

32 topical units introducing biology, chemistry, physics, and earth science.

32 more units building on Discover Science with deeper scientific inquiry.

Business letters, reports, resumes, and technical documentation.

Guided reading companion for developing young readers.

Let's Read: Five Children and It

A read-aloud companion for E. Nesbit's classic adventure.

Language

▼

Encountering Spanish

Middle / High School

First-year Spanish with cultural context across 16 chapters.

Words from the Ancients: Latin & Greek Roots

Middle / High School

Build English vocabulary through Latin and Greek word roots.

Religion

▼

Religious Roundtable

High School

Comparative study of world religions through primary sources and discussion.

📖 Textbook 🎥 Videos — Coming Soon ✎ Quizzes — Coming Soon

About This Catalog

All materials are generated by the Curriculum Factory — an automated pipeline that converts LaTeX textbooks into multimedia learning experiences using Claude Code (Anthropic), Google NotebookLM, and the YouTube Data API.

Textbooks are CC BY-SA 4.0 licensed. Video content is AI-generated. Quizzes are auto-graded via Google Forms. This is a beta release — content may contain errors.

Not professional advice: These materials are for educational purposes only and do not constitute professional educational, financial, medical, legal, or religious advice.

Read · Watch · Quiz — A complete learning experience

Content licensed under CC BY-SA 4.0 — Copyright © 2025–2026 JD Jones

AI-assisted: Claude Code + Google NotebookLM
